document_info.title: KPI Targets 2025 - Engineering Operations Intelligent Support Center

avg_response_time_p1_minutes.measurement: Rolling 30-day average of time from incident creation to first expert contact for P1 incidents

avg_resolution_time_hours.measurement: Average time from incident creation to resolution across all severities

first_contact_resolution_pct.measurement: Percentage of incidents resolved during the first expert interaction

expert_utilization_pct.measurement: Percentage of available expert hours spent on active support sessions

avg_sessions_per_expert_per_day.measurement: Average number of support sessions handled per expert per working day

knowledge_reuse_rate_pct.measurement: Percentage of incidents where a previously documented solution was applied

knowledge_base_articles.measurement: Total number of validated knowledge articles in the system

knowledge_article_quality_score.measurement: Average user rating of knowledge articles

ai_assisted_resolution_pct.measurement: Percentage of incidents where AI provided the primary diagnostic recommendation that led to resolution

ai_recommendation_accuracy_pct.measurement: Percentage of AI recommendations accepted by experts without modification

automated_triage_pct.measurement: Percentage of incoming incidents automatically categorized and prioritized by AI

system_uptime_pct.measurement: Platform availability excluding planned maintenance windows
system_uptime_pct.notes: New system - no baseline; target based on project charter SLA

edge_node_availability_pct.measurement: Average availability of edge computing nodes at field sites

mean_time_to_recover_minutes.measurement: Average time to restore service after unplanned outage

user_satisfaction_score.measurement: Quarterly user satisfaction survey score (field engineers + HQ experts)

mobile_app_adoption_pct.measurement: Percentage of field engineers actively using the mobile app (monthly active users)

training_completion_pct.measurement: Percentage of target users who completed platform training

cost_per_incident_reduction_pct.measurement: Average fully-loaded cost per incident (personnel time + system costs + downtime impact)

unplanned_downtime_reduction_pct.measurement: Total unplanned production downtime hours attributable to equipment failures
